titlestmt.titleproper: Pamphlets on sex education and sexual health
Sex education and sexual health, pamphlets on
titlestmt.author: Katherine Isham

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday October 25, 2024 at 02:00

did.unittitle: Pamphlets on sex education and sexual health

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection was created by Historical Library staff from materials gifted by Bert Hansen. Materials include pamphlets created by organizations, medical care providers, and companies regarding sex education and/or sexual health from 1862-1957. Items in the collection may address specific audiences: parents, adolescents, single or married people, or people of a specific gender. Materials from anatomical museums, medical providers, and companies include advertising for services and/or products.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in 5 series: Series I: American Medical Association, 1933–1937. American Social Hygiene Association Series II: American Social Hygiene Association, 1944–1952. Series III: Anatomical museums, 1862-1903, undated. Series IV: Claremont Printing Company "Sex Facts" series, 1922. Series V: Other, 1891-1957, undated.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pamphlets on sex education and sexual health. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection was created by Historical Library staff from materials gifted by Bert Hansen. Materials include pamphlets created by organizations, medical care providers, and companies regarding sex education and/or sexual health from 1862-1957. Items in the collection may address specific audiences: parents, adolescents, single or married people, or people of a specific gender. Materials from anatomical museums, medical providers, and companies include advertising for services and/or products.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: American Medical Association
Rice, Thurman B., The venereal diseases . Sex Education Pamphlets. Chicago, Illinois: American Medical Association, 1933.
Rice, Thurman B., The age of romance . Sex Education Pamphlets. Chicago, Illinois: American Medical Association, 1937.
Rice, Thurman B., How life goes on and on: a story for girls of high school age . Sex Education Pamphlets. Chicago, Illinois: American Medical Association, 1937.
Rice, Thurman B., In training for boys of high school age . Sex Education Pamphlets. Chicago, Illinois: American Medical Association, 1937.
Rice, Thurman B., The story of life for boys and girls of ten years . Sex Education Pamphlets. Chicago, Illinois: American Medical Association, 1937.
American Social Hygiene Association
American Social Hygiene Association, From boy to man . New York City, New York, 1944.
Brown, Helen W., Sex education in the home . New York City, New York: American Social Hygiene Association, 1952.
Snow, William F., Health for man and boy , Special Series no. 1. New York City, New York: American Social Hygiene Association, 1949.
Snow, William F., Marriage and parenthood , Special Series no. III. New York City, New York: American Social Hygiene Association, 1949.
Snow, William F., Women and their health , Special Series no. II. New York City, New York: American Social Hygiene Association, 1949.
Anatomical museums

Davieson, Drs. S. & D., Practical observations on nervous debility and physical exhaustion to which is added an essay on marriage, with important chapters on disorders of the reproductive organs, being a synopis of lectures delivered at the museum of anatomy . Saint Louis, Missouri, 1871.
Daviseon, Drs. S. and D., Descriptive catalogue of Drs. S. & D. Davieson's Grand Museum of Anatomy . St. Louis, Missouri: Greeley Printery of St. Louis, 1903.
Jordan, Dr., Dr. Beck, Catalogue of the Parisian Cabinet of Wonders and Anatomy , no. 40 Bond Street, New-York. New York City, New York: T. B. Harrison & Co., Steam Job Printers, 1862.
Jordan, Dr. L. J., Man's mission on earth: a treatise on nervous debility and physical exhaustion, being a synopsis of lectures delivered at Kahn's Museum of Anatomy . New York City, New York, 1871.
Kahn, Dr., Dr. Jordan, Hand book and descriptive catalogue of Dr. Kahn's Museum of Anatomy and Medical Science . New York City, New York: Isaac Goldman Co. Printers.
Oregon Medical Institute, World's Museum of Anatomy, Diary and account book . Portland, Oregon, 1909.
Williams, Lucas R., World's Musee of Anatomy catalogue . Chicago, Illinois: World Musee of Anatomy, 1888.
Claremont Printing Company "Sex Facts" series
Hubbard, S. Dana, Facts about marriage every young man & woman should know . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Facts about motherhood . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Sex facts for the adolescent and matured girl . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Sex facts for young boys . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Sex facts for young men . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Sex knowledge for the mature mind . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.
Hubbard, S. Dana, Truth about quacks and self medication . London, England: Claremont Printing Company, 1922.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 2 copies; includes envelope advertising the 7 pamphlet series on "Sex Facts."

did.unittitle: Other
Civiale Agency, Glad tidings of good things . New York City, New York, 1895.
Civiale Agency, Glad tidings of good things , 12th edition. New York City, New York.
Fowler, F. C., Good news for weak, debilitated men . Moodus, Connecticut, 1891.
Franklin Ford Dispensary of Special Remedies for Diseases of Men, "Letter to a dear friend." Jackson, Michigan, 1910.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes original envelope, return envelope, Free Treatment Blank card, and case report form.

did.unittitle: Greer, Joseph H., The mystery of nature and the glory of creation: sex and life . Chicago, Illinois.
Doctor E. B. Herrick and Associates, Account book for future reference, What every man should know . Buffalo, New York.
Hymes, James L., How to tell your child about sex , Public Affairs Pamphlet no. 149, fifteenth edition. New York City, New York, 1958.
Lee, Joseph M., A man's life . Joliet, Illinois: Modern Film Distributors, 1957.
Lewin, S. A., John Gilmore, Sex without fear: a new scientific sex manual for your patients . New York City, New York: Lear Publishers.
Lyman, Edward B., Let's tell the whole story about sex . New York City, New York: American Social Health Association.
New York State Department of Health, Health Education Service, The gift of life . New York, 1951.
Polyglandol: the gland tonic supreme for men who have lost their pep . Chicago, Illinois.
Zonite Products Corporation, The newer knowledge of feminine hygiene . New York City, New York, 1928.
